about_text1: I'm a Python developer focused on Data and Artificial Intelligence. I'm passionate about transforming data into valuable insights and building solutions driven by analytics, automation, and AI.
about_text2: I'm currently in the first semester of an Artificial Intelligence degree, where I'm deepening my knowledge of Python, SQL, data analysis, data engineering, and AI applications. I'm committed to continuous learning through study and hands-on projects, building a solid foundation for a professional career in the fields of Data and Artificial Intelligence.
proj1_desc: An interactive quiz game where you try to identify the secret country using hints. CLI version made in Python and Web version with Html, Css and JavaScript.
course1_desc: An introductory course on the fundamental concepts of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP): classes, objects, inheritance, encapsulation, and polymorphism.
